meaning: adj.口齿不清的,说话不连贯的,不善于表达的,(动物)无关节的
examples: Inarticulate and rather shy, he had always dreaded speaking in public.
Leave an inarticulate, angry comment below.
Perhaps both of Tagore and Zhang are inarticulate people.
Yet the fact remained that in a clumsy, inarticulate way, Twitter was taking a stand.
It was conceived, and is born, after many years of inarticulate worshipping at their shrines.
